name: studio.get_seo_report
description: Fetch the latest SEO audit report for an Actium Studio site. Returns per-issue findings, severity, and a rolled-up score.
whenToUse: Start of an 'improve this site' flow — enumerate current SEO issues before proposing edits.
Post-publish sanity check: after a batch of updates, confirm the score did not regress.
Operator-facing diagnostic: answer 'how is my site's SEO doing' with concrete numbers.
whenNotToUse: No audit has been run recently — the report may be stale; pair with studio.trigger_seo_audit first.
Caller wants keyword rankings — use studio.list_keywords; this skill reports technical SEO issues.
Caller wants analytics (traffic, conversion) — use studio.get_analytics_overview; SEO report is audit data only.
